name: Chicken Noodle Yogurt Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 quart Chicken broth (OR 2 Bouillon cubes AND 2 quarts Water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour oil into soup pot; add onion and cook for 5 minutes.
2. Add broth/bouillon cubes, garlic, thyme, soy sauce, salt, parsley, basil, and carrots. Cover and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Stir in noodles and cook uncovered for 10 minutes.
5. Add chicken.
6. In a separate bowl, stir arrowroot into yogurt; blend well.
7. Add the mixture to the soup, stirring as needed.
8. Increase heat to boiling and allow soup to thicken slightly.
9. Garnish with chopped green onions.
